content: View usage per API key on the

comment.text: The translation key "ApiKeyViewUsage" is used to describe the functionality of viewing API key usage. It appears in a link on the PortalSettings page, informing users that clicking on it will display usage details for each API key. This text helps to explain the purpose of the link and provides context for translators.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The English text ends with 'on the', implying it is a prefix to a link or a specific location (e.g., 'on the dashboard'). The Azerbaijani translation is a complete sentence ('View usage per API key') and omits the trailing prepositional phrase, which will cause a grammatical break when the link text follows it.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Hər API açarı üzrə istifadəni aşağıdakı:

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The English source ends with 'on the', implying the sentence continues (likely to a link or a specific section), but the Finnish translation ends abruptly after 'API-avain', omitting the prepositional phrase/context.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The English text ends with 'on the', implying it is a prefix to a link or a specific location, whereas the Korean translation is a complete noun phrase 'View usage per API key'. This results in a grammatical mismatch if the UI expects a sentence fragment to lead into a link.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Romanian translation is incomplete. It ends abruptly and misses the prepositional phrase 'on the' (pe/în), which is necessary to connect the sentence to the link that follows in the UI.
